Subject: Re: Meeting Scheduled for Thursday

Dear [Name],

Thank you for reaching out regarding our scheduled meeting for Thursday. Unfortunately, my calendar is fully booked for that day and I don't have any availability.

However, I can confirm that I am available on Friday at any time. Is it possible to reschedule our meeting for that day? If so, would it be feasible to move the meeting to 12 PM on Friday?

 I appreciate your understanding and flexibility in this matter.

Thank you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Thank you again for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you soon.
